name: done-yet
description: Postcondition checks for agents that say a task is done.

scripts.lint: node --check bin/done-yet.mjs && node --check engine/verifier.mjs && node --check engine/pointers.mjs && node --check plugins/done-yet/scripts/stop-guard.mjs
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run console:lint && npm test && npm run console:build
